name: Task Ledger
description: Durable workflow layer for OpenClaw long-running work. Provides multi-stage workflow tracking with persistence, enabling agents to manage complex multi-step tasks without losing state. ClawHub-only distribution.
review: Durable multi-stage workflow tracking for OpenClaw. Addresses a real need for agents handling long-running work. ClawHub-only distribution with 78 downloads. Conditional approval at 7.3/10.
catalog_note: Durable multi-stage workflow tracking. ClawHub-only distribution.
